summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord Stream Selfbot Control Panel - all backend APIs and frontend UI functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Backend: Bootstrap endpoint returns complete state
Backend: Channels CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Presets CRUD operations with normalization
Backend: Events CRUD operations (single and recurring)
Frontend: App loads with German UI
Frontend: Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Channels, Presets, Events, Logs)
Frontend: Dashboard displays all status cards correctly
Frontend: Channel creation form and list display
Frontend: Preset creation form with working tabs
Frontend: Event creation form with recurrence options
Frontend: Sidebar refresh and stop buttons
Integration: Frontend successfully communicates with backend APIs
Integration: Data persistence and retrieval working
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and interactions working)
